summary: Backend endpoints all pass (6/6). Frontend has a blocking webpack compile error from a missing icon export (SiLinkedin) in Footer.jsx, which renders a webpack-dev-server-client-overlay iframe that intercepts pointer events. This blocks FAQ accordion clicks and newsletter submit button. Home hero CTA, feature-ai card, code tabs+copy, pricing features, about stats, docs page all render/work. Contact form submit test failed because test used page.fill on a <select> — needs select_option (test-side, not app bug), but the underlying overlay likely also blocks the submit button.

failed.issue: Webpack compile error: 'SiLinkedin' is not exported from 'react-icons/si' (imported in src/components/layout/Footer.jsx line 312). Correct name is 'SiLinkedin' export doesn't exist in this react-icons version — likely should be 'FaLinkedin' (react-icons/fa) or 'SiLinkedin' from a different subpackage. Error renders webpack-dev-server-client-overlay <iframe> that intercepts pointer events across the page.
failed.evidence: supervisor frontend.out.log: "Attempted import error: 'SiLinkedin' is not exported from 'react-icons/si' ... ERROR in ./src/components/layout/Footer.jsx 312:20-30". Playwright click retries fail with '<iframe src="about:blank" id="webpack-dev-server-client-overlay"> intercepts pointer events' on faq-trigger-0 and newsletter-submit.

failed.issue: faq-trigger-0 click blocked by webpack overlay iframe (downstream of the SiLinkedin error).
failed.evidence: Playwright log shows repeated retries with overlay interception on data-testid=faq-trigger-0.

failed.issue: newsletter-submit click blocked by webpack overlay iframe; Subscribed state never appears.

Exact string 'Ship your backend before your coffee gets cold.' not matched by a single-node text selector — headline may be split across multiple spans/elements. CTA still visible so likely a text-split, not a missing headline. Verify visually.
failed.evidence: page.locator(text=...).is_visible() returned False while hero-cta-primary is True.

action_items: Fix Footer.jsx import: replace SiLinkedin (from react-icons/si) with a valid export, e.g. FaLinkedin/FaLinkedinIn from react-icons/fa, or use the correct simple-icons name. This will remove the webpack overlay and unblock FAQ + newsletter interactions.

After fix, retest FAQ accordion expand, newsletter submit (expect Subscribed state), and contact form submit end-to-end (note: contact-subject is a <select>, so submit flow should be re-verified once overlay is gone).
Confirm hero headline is rendered as a single readable string (or accept split rendering).
